name: Web3ActionBar
description: Universal bottom bar for Web3 apps providing wallet connection and blockchain action buttons. Pairs with TabList for hybrid web2/web3 app navigation.

isConnected.description: Whether a wallet is currently connected

walletAddress.description: Connected wallet address to display (truncated automatically)

onConnect.description: Callback when connect button is clicked

onDisconnect.description: Callback when disconnect button is clicked

className.description: Additional CSS classes for the container

children.description: App-specific action buttons (My Vault, Place Offering, Stake, etc.) shown when connected

disconnectIcon.description: Icon component for the disconnect button

examples.name: Connected with actions
examples.code:
<Web3ActionBar
  isConnected={true}
  walletAddress="0x1234...5678"
  onConnect={handleConnect}
  onDisconnect={handleDisconnect}
  disconnectIcon={<CloseIcon />}
>
  <Button variant="outline">My Vault</Button>
  <Button>Place Offering</Button>
</Web3ActionBar>
